name: @act-spec/example-wordpress-blog
description: Headless WordPress blog demo wired to ACT via @act-spec/adapter-wordpress. Reads a baked WP REST fixture (no live WordPress required), runs the canonical generator pipeline, and emits ACT artefacts plus llms.txt / llms-full.txt into public/.
author: Jeremy Forsythe <jeremy@act-spec.org>

scripts.conformance: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-wordpress-blog: example exercises end-to-end via conformance')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-wordpress-blog: lint covered by typecheck + conformance')"
